examples: The Mughal dynasty reached its highest strength and fame during the reign of their early Emperors, Akbar, Jehangir, and Shah Jehan.
Besides crunching numbers, Jehangir often picks the brains of industry consultants for in-depth, qualitative information.
When FORBES GLOBAL met Jehangir last year, he confessed that it was his first media interview.
Jehangir's portfolio also bears little resemblance to MSCI World or, for that matter, any other index.
